name: Quick Cheddar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the butter to the dry ingredients. Using your fingers or a pastry cutter, cut the butter into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in the cheddar cheese.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk and eggs.
5. Pour the milk and egg mixture into the flour mixture and stir until just moistened.
6. Grease a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for about an hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the pan immediately and let cool on a wire rack.
